description: CompositionNavy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colors Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Get ready to feel like a Kryptonian with this navy blue superman tee from  bioworld. The graphic on the front depicts superman in a classic stance - getting ready to give his famous punch – and induces this tee with his power. Pair this t-shirt with sneakers and light denims for that stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
